alkylation reagent: alkylated with 2-Chloroacetamide (50 mM) before overnight digestion with Trypsin.
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 2-Chloroacetamide (50 mM) before overnight digestion with Trypsin.
cleavage agent: alkylated with 2-Chloroacetamide (50 mM) before overnight digestion with Trypsin.
fragmentation method: higher-energy collision dissociation (HCD) fragmentation at 30% of normalized collision energy.
instrument: Data were collected on a Q-Exactive UHMR mass spectrometer (ThermoFisher).
